Bus Timings

Dubai Bus Stop at Al Barsha (3) Street 20 B 1: Key Details

July 19, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

The Al Barsha (3), Street 20 B 1 Bus Stop is a key transit hub located in the Al Barsha 3 area of Dubai. This bus stop offers essential connectivity for both daily commuters and visitors, providing access to a range of amenities including dining options, shopping centers, and healthcare facilities. Its strategic location makes it a convenient point for those navigating the vibrant Al Barsha neighborhood.

Address

Al Barsha 3 Dubai United Arab Emirates

Map

View Google Maps directions here.

Situated in a well-connected part of Dubai, the Al Barsha (3), Street 20 B 1 Bus Stop integrates seamlessly into the city’s public transportation network. The stop’s accessibility to various local services and attractions highlights its importance for both residents and travelers.

Bus Routes and Timings

The Al Barsha (3), Street 20 B 1 Bus Stop is serviced by Bus Route F33. Here are the bus timings:

Bus Route Bus Station Timings
F33 Al Barsha 3 11:50 AM
F33 Al Barsha 3 12:50 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 1:53 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 2:57 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 3:56 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 4:49 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 5:24 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 5:54 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 6:24 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 6:54 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 7:22 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 7:52 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 8:19 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 8:49 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 9:19 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 9:49 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 10:19 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 10:59 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 12:02 AM
F33 Al Barsha 3 5:40 AM
F33 Al Barsha 3 6:33 AM
F33 Al Barsha 3 7:26 AM
F33 Al Barsha 3 8:11 AM
F33 Al Barsha 3 8:39 AM
F33 Al Barsha 3 9:08 AM

Bus Route Details

The Al Barsha (3), Street 20 B 1 Bus Stop is exclusively served by Bus Route F33, ensuring consistent service throughout the day.

  • F33 Route: This route provides comprehensive coverage within the Al Barsha area, with frequent departures from early morning until late at night. The F33 bus connects Al Barsha 3 to various key points within the locality, offering a reliable option for both work and leisure travel.

Nearby Destinations

The Al Barsha (3), Street 20 B 1 Bus Stop is ideally located near several notable amenities and services:

Cafeterias

  • Al Hadaq Seafood Restaurant: A popular spot for seafood lovers, offering a variety of fresh dishes.

  • Clucker’s Wood Roasted Chicken Restaurant: Known for its wood-roasted chicken and casual dining experience.
  • Baalbak Restaurant: Serves traditional Middle Eastern cuisine in a welcoming atmosphere.
  • Al Mubarkia Restaurant: Provides a diverse menu of local and international dishes.
Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

Landmarks

  • Leader Villa Al Barsha 3: A significant residential complex in the area.

  • Khalid’s House: A local landmark and prominent residence.
  • Masjid Entrance and Parking: Located near a mosque with convenient parking facilities.
  • Hassan Ali Villa: A well-known local residence.
  • Nopoli Tower A: A notable building in the vicinity.

Healthcare Facilities

  • American Hospital Clinic: Offers a range of medical services and specialist consultations.

  • IMC Medical Centre: Provides comprehensive healthcare services.
  • Sultan Al Olama Medical Al Barsha: A local medical facility with various healthcare services.
  • Al Barsha Health Centre: Serves the community with general healthcare services.

Shopping Centers

  • Souq Extra Shopping Mall: A local mall featuring a variety of retail stores and services.

  • Labelle Chocolate Galleria Mall: Specializes in chocolate and boutique shopping.

Pharmacies

  • Al Barsha Pharmacy: A well-stocked pharmacy for various health needs.

Nearby Stops

  1. Al Barsha 3, Al Hawa Street A(294m): F33

  2. Al Barsha 3, Al Hawa Street C(454m): F33

  3. Al Barsha 3, Al Salam School(563m): F33

  4. Al Barsha 3, Street 329 A-1(674m): F33

Its frequent bus service, strategic location, and accessibility make it a vital part of the Al Barsha area’s public transport network. Whether you’re commuting, shopping, or exploring the neighborhood, this bus stop provides a convenient and efficient way to travel within Dubai.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: July 19, 2025.
